CustomField.description: Optional Apex class name for custom donation matching logic. When populated, the data import process uses this class instead of the standard donation matching engine. The class must implement the BDI_IMatching interface. Include the namespace prefix if applicable.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the fully qualified Apex class name that implements BDI_IMatching for custom donation matching. Leave blank to use the standard matching logic.
CustomField.label: Donation Matching Implementing Class
